title: Tool Caller — Validate & Repair an LLM's Function Calls Before They Run
tagline: Paste the tool call a model just produced and watch it get checked against the tool's JSON Schema — hallucinated tool names, wrong types, bad enums, malformed JSON — then auto-repaired into a call that would actually run. 100% in your browser, no API key.
description: In-browser validator + repairer for LLM function/tool calls: JSON-Schema checks mapped to the tool-use failure taxonomy, with safe auto-repair. No API key.
